name: paperflow
description: Connected literature archiving and user-guided linear synthesis for Obsidian.
skillInstructions: Use evidence from the user-selected Obsidian vault. Keep a warm tone while remaining independent, explicit about uncertainty, and critical of unsupported claims.

interface.shortDescription: From connected papers to coherent arguments
interface.longDescription: Atlas archives and connects papers; Thread turns the user's own knowledge base into a transparent, revisable argument.
